ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical study */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "protocol_number" TEXT /* Protocol number associated with the study */,
  "study_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the study (e.g., Phase I, Phase II) */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., PK, PD, PK/PD) */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the patient is enrolled in */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Current medications taken by the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doses" (
  "dose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dose */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study associated with the dose */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the dose */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the dose was administered */,
  "dose_amount" REAL /* Amount of drug administered */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  "amt" REAL /* Amount of drug in the compartment (CMT) */,
  "cmt" INTEGER /* CMT identifier for the dose */,
  "mdv" INTEGER /* MDV (missing data value) indicator */,
  "dose_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dose (e.g., milligrams, milliliters) */,
  "administration_device" TEXT /* Device used for administration (e.g., syringe, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doses_route FOREIGN KEY ("route") REFERENCES administration_routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doses_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pharmacokinetics" (
  "pk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PK record */,
  "dose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dose associated with this PK data */,
  "cl" REAL /* Clearance rate of the drug */,
  "v2" REAL /* Volume of distribution for the drug */,
  "q" REAL /* Rate constant for the drug */,
  "v3" REAL /* Second volume of distribution */,
  "ka" REAL /* Absorption rate constant */,
  "eta1" REAL /* Elimination half-life metric 1 */,
  "eta2" REAL /* Elimination half-life metric 2 */,
  "eta3" REAL /* Elimination half-life metric 3 */,
  "eta4" REAL /* Elimination half-life metric 4 */,
  "eta5" REAL /* Elimination half-life metric 5 */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area under the concentration-time curve */,
  "cmax" REAL /* Maximum concentration */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Time of maximum concentration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pharmacokinetics_dose_id FOREIGN KEY ("dose_id") REFERENCES doses ("dose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "pk_id" INTEGER /* PK record ID associated with this result */,
  "dv" REAL /* Dependent variable measurement */,
  "pred" REAL /* Predicted value */,
  "res" REAL /* Residual value */,
  "wres" REAL /* Weighted residual */,
  "sim" INTEGER /* Simulation identifier */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., simulation, actual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_pk_id FOREIGN KEY ("pk_id") REFERENCES pharmacokinetics ("pk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administration_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administration route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route (e.g., IV, Oral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., parenteral, enteral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dosage_forms" (
  "dosage_form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dosage form */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the dosage form (e.g., tablet, injection) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dosage form */,
  "form_type" TEXT /* Type of dosage form (e.g., solid, liquid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dosage_form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clearing_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clearance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the clearance metric (e.g., Clearance Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., mL/min, L/h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_metrics" (
  "volume_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the volume metric (e.g., Volume of Distribution) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., L, mL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, data update) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., study, patient, dose) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the study site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the study site */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_site_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study site */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., researcher, coordinator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_site_participants_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES study_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_site_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_site_participants_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
